rows.evidence: At least one real pedestrian/drone dataset loaded and converted.
At least one pedestrian/drone source supports verified t+50/t+100.
At least 3 human-confirmed or high-quality silver scenes exist.
GoalBench beats majority or improves calibrated goal metrics.
At least 300 multi-agent episodes with >=2 agents.
Learned deterministic model beats strongest causal baseline.
Easy subset degradation <=2% is not proven by the latest report.
Scene/goal ablation is not proven to improve trajectory metrics.
Interaction module does not yet improve hard/failure trajectory metrics.
No major physical-validity degradation reported in Stage 12 summary.
Must pass deterministic scene/goal/interaction gates first.
No stochastic proposal with coverage lift exists.
